description.div: Guernsey is a Crown Dependencies. It is not part of the United Kingdom, but a self-governing possessions of the British Crown.
Jersey is a Crown Dependencies. It is not part of the United Kingdom, but a self-governing possessions of the British Crown.
Isle of Man is a Crown Dependencies. It is not part of the United Kingdom, but a self-governing possessions of the British Crown.

transliterations.transliteration: tshenn 于 king 戌 Liân jī gue̍h-tshe/ge̍h-tshue jī li̍t tsiong 于 píng tsí Liân Tsa̍p tsi̍t gue̍h-tshe/ge̍h-tshue jī li̍t
